title: Maisto DUCATI MONSTER Motorbike - Incredibly Detailed Die-Cast Replica Collectible Model - 1:18 Scale, Red
features: A classic and sleek motorcycle, replicated with exceptional accuracy where no detail is overlooked, from the distinctive engine, seat and elegant curves, an absolutely faithful replica bike.

Manufactured from diecast metal and finely detailed plastic; a fantastically detailed engine, beautifully recreated cowl and exceptional decoration, livery and paint finish. Sits on smooth rolling rubber tires with articulated steering.
Marvel at the intricate detail, realism and authenticity of this incredible replica. Enjoy the astonishing graphics and high-quality paint finishes of this unique vehicle.
Proudly display it in any collection. This model is possibly the perfect size to display its amazing details at 22cm long X 9cm wide X 14cm tall
Meets and exceeds all UK, US and European safety standards (EN 71). Makes an excellent gift for any automotive enthusiast. Appropriate for ages 3+.
description: Product Description Experience Maisto Diecast, a captivating assortment of meticulously crafted diecast scale models that will impress and delight collectors and enthusiasts alike. Each model is a true masterpiece carefully replicating, in exacting detail, iconic cars and motorbikes from the past and present. With precision engineering and obsessive attention to detail, Maisto has perfected the art of die-cast manufacturing creating exceptional, authentic replicas of remarkable accuracy and spot-on realism. From classics evoking a bygone era to sleek exotics that embody elegance and power, we cater to every enthusiast’s passion. Each model features intricately reproduced interiors, detailed engines and authentic paint finishes worthy of showcasing in any display. The collection is available in selected 1:18, 1:24, 1:43 and 1:64 scales. Join us on a journey through automotive history to today’s iconic super cars. Collect, display or simply play and be transported to a world of fascination, imagination and admiration. Maisto is brought to you by One For Fun Toys, an industry leading manufacturer and distributor of toys, impulse items and collectibles. For almost 50 years we have offered high-quality, innovative and safe products that engage and enthrall children and adults alike. We strive to promote creativity, discovery, entertainment and imagination with products designed to delight and engineered to endure. From Impulse to Games, Plush to Outdoor, Figurines to Playsets. Along with Maisto, One For Fun offers Tobar and HGL toys, OzBozz Ride-ons and Bburago Collectible Diecast Safety Warning Small parts, chocking hazzard
